query_normalized: qwen-image-flash: beyond objective design computer science
rationale: The paper studies multimodal vision‑language models by introducing a hierarchical cross‑attention mechanism and a staged training strategy, providing empirical performance data on standard vision‑language benchmarks. This addresses the same domain (vision‑language model design) and offers a foundational methodology that would be cited in a review of approaches beyond standard objective designs for systems like Qwen‑Image‑Flash (acceptance category (b) and (d)).
